cards.en: ON Monday / ON Friday / ON Sunday
ON 5th May / ON the 1st of January
ON my birthday / ON our anniversary
ON Christmas Day / ON New Year's Day ← но: AT Christmas = период
ON Monday morning / ON Friday evening / ON Sunday night
ON time — The train arrived on time ← не путать: IN time = успеть
ON that day / ON the day of the wedding
ON the following day / ON the previous day
ON the weekend ← брит.: AT the weekend
